title: We are so very grateful for this truly transformational gift of $10m from the Goodman Foundation and  the opportunity to partner with a fully valued aligned organisation to bring this vital project to improve hospital based mental health care to life.
post: We are so very grateful for this truly transformational gift of $10m from the Goodman Foundation and  the opportunity to partner with a fully valued aligned organisation to bring this vital project to improve hospital based mental health care to life. Thank you to all at the Goodman Foundation for your inspirational philanthropy in support of our community. We have loved working with Kris Ashpole Alison Brink  to launch this important mental health initiative for our community. Thank you to all our Founding donors for your belief in doing as the  Sisters of Charity would have wanted us to do - remembering that as Sister Margaret Mines said:”It is because it’s difficult that we do it.”St Vincent's Curran Foundation St Vincent's Health Australia  St Vincent’s Health Network Sydney Anna McFadgen Carrie D. Chris Ash Joe Portelli Paul Preisz Lyn Chiem Jacqueline Huber Mike Millard Kay Wilhelm AM Carly Vickers
